## Pages
- [About the Challenge - National Economics Challenge](/aboutchallenge): Learn about the National Economics Challenge
- [About Us | National Economics Challenge](/aboutus): Discover the mission, core values, and the story behind the founder of the National Economics Challenge.
- [Access & Outreach | National Economics Challenge](/accessoutreach): Discover our mission to democratize economic literacy by translating winning essays and distributing them to under-resourced communities.
- [Competition Manual & Submission - National Economics Challenge](/submissions): Official Competition Manual for the National Economics Challenge. Read guidelines, eligibility, and submit your essay.
- [Competition Manual | National Economics Challenge](/competitionmanual): Step-by-step guide on how the National Economics Challenge works, eligibility, rules, evaluation, and FAQs.
- [Contact Us | National Economics Challenge](/contact): Get in touch with the National Economics Challenge team.
- [Email Confirmation | National Economics Challenge](/confirmation): No description available
- [Log In | National Economics Challenge](/login): No description available
- [National Economics Challenge | Inaugural 2026 Edition](/home): Democratizing economic literacy through the National Economics Challenge. A premier essay competition empowering the next generation of global economic thinkers.
- [Pending Verification | National Economics Challenge](/pendingverification): No description available
- [Prompt Bank - National Economics Challenge](/promptbank): Browse our extensive collection of economics essay prompts. Choose from topics in inflation, education, labor markets, inequality, and more.
- [Publications | National Economics Challenge](/publications): Learn about the National Economics Booklet, publication criteria, and the benefits of becoming a published young scholar.
- [Sign Up | National Economics Challenge](/signup): No description available
- [Submission Successful | National Economics Challenge](/submissionsuccess): No description available
- [Submit Essay | National Economics Challenge](/essaysubmission): No description available
- [Submit Essay | National Economics Challenge](/submission): No description available
- [The Archive | National Economics Challenge](/archive): Explore the open-access archive of past National Economics Challenge winning essays and student scholarship.
- [The Schola & National Economics Booklet](/schola): The National Economics Booklet features the top 10 research papers from the competition, published on The Schola, a premier high school scholarship platform.
- [Verify Email | National Economics Challenge](/verification): No description available
